action.description: The action that produced this exchange (user messages).

edited.description: True when the content was edited after the fact (derived at read).

id.description:
Stable id for edits/deletes. Absent in v1 journals — materialization
assigns a deterministic id (UUID v5 over object + line index) so old
messages stay editable and edits survive re-reads.

incomplete.description: True when the assistant response was cut off mid-stream.
